name: Interactive Plush Toy - Panda - Cloud Island™
description:
Give your little one cute a cute option for play with the Panda Interactive Plush Toy from cloud island™. This interactive toy is designed in the shape of a panda with built-in rings on the hands in different designs. Made with soft fabric, this BPA-free toy comes with a built-in loop for easy hanging.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
